demographics.living_situation: lives at home with spouse, who is present and helping communicate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach has swollen up like a balloon since yesterday, and I have this deep, continuous, tearing pain under my right ribs that won't let up. My eyes have gone yellow and I can't lie down because I can't breathe.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The swelling and the pain came on fast over the last day and it's getting worse — my spouse called because I can't get comfortable and I'm struggling to breathe when I lie back.

symptom_narrative.onset: the tearing right-side pain and the fast swelling started over the last 24 hours; the tiredness, poor appetite and weight loss have been creeping up for about 4 months
symptom_narrative.duration: about a day for the acute pain and swelling; months for the weight loss and exhaustion
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, continuous, tearing ache under the right ribs that has become sharp and agonising tonight; the belly feels tight and stretched
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is the worst it has ever been and nothing shifts it; the swelling makes my clothes not fit at all
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: under the right ribs and across a hugely swollen belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and steadily getting worse since yesterday
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting bolt upright helps my breathing a little; nothing helps the pain
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat makes me breathless, and any movement makes the pain worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: new yellowing of the eyes and skin, feeling my heart racing, breathlessness, no appetite at all
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had a bit of fluid and swelling before but never like this, and never with this pain
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't lie flat, I'm stuck in the chair, and I can't do anything because of the pain and breathlessness

past_medical_history.how_managed: long-standing, told my liver is scarred (cirrhosis)
followed up for the liver, takes water tablets for fluid

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse; spouse is very distressed by how quickly things have changed and by the pain

objective_data_offered.value: the whites of his eyes and his skin look yellow (jaundiced)
his belly is hugely swollen and tight, the skin looks stretched and shiny
he is sitting bolt upright leaning forward, breathing fast and shallow, and says he cannot lie back without getting breathless
his weight and belly size have shot up over a day so his clothes won't fasten, and he says he has lost a lot of weight over the last few months
home thermometer read about 37.4 degrees, so no real fever
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer, not clinically verified
